overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a busy urban intersection resembling Times Square, with heavy traffic and pedestrians below. Third-person game engine footage showing the character observing the vibrant cityscape in bright daylight.

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched on a building ledge, remaining still while watching the traffic and pedestrians moving along the avenue below

entered.detail: Tall glass skyscraper with reflective windows that Spider-Man is perched on
Concrete ledge extending from the building where Spider-Man is crouching
Large red digital billboards at the end of the avenue displaying advertisements
Tall glass building with multiple illuminated digital screens
Purple illuminated billboard mounted on the right building
Multi-lane city street filled with yellow taxis and other vehicles

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man is perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling urban avenue resembling Times Square. The scene features tall glass office towers with large digital billboards, heavy traffic moving along the multi-lane street below, and pedestrians walking on the sidewalks. The camera maintains a steady third-person view from behind the character, capturing the vibrant city atmosphere in bright daylight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady third-person perspective of Spider-Man perched high above a vibrant, daylight-drenched urban intersection. It begins with the character overlooking a bustling avenue resembling Times Square, where tall glass office towers and massive digital billboards dominate the skyline. As the camera holds its position, the view expands to capture the rhythmic flow of heavy traffic moving along the multi-lane street below. The scene then settles on the constant motion of pedestrians filling the sidewalks, emphasizing the scale and energy of the city from the skyscraper's ledge.
